title: 24Pcs Snowy Artificial Pine Needles Branches Twigs 24cm Fake Frosted Pine Picks Greenery Stems Christmas Tree Pick Winter Faux Fir Sprays Twig for Crafts Christmas Wreaths Season Decor
features: 【Package Quantity】 You will receive 24 pieces snowy Christmas artificial pine branches.Enough quantities perfect for making xmas wreaths,pine garland,pine tree decor,pine wreath,pine branches with berry and pine stems.

【High Quality】These artificial greenery pine branches are made of plastic leaves with iron wire stem,looks beautiful and real,not easy to break or fade,will not wither and reusable,which you can apply for a long time.

【Realistic Appearance】Green artificial pine needles are covered with white vivid snowflakes,life like and delicate,have a light and airy feel which is the perfect winter time decoration,easy to pair with many Xmas themed decor

【Proper Size】The size of snowflocked artificial pine branches is 25cm / 10 inch,perfect size can well decor your home and party.You can decorate your kitchen bedroom,table,wall,door or DIY christmas tree, christmas garland etc.

【Wide Application】Fake Greenery Pine Sprigs can match any christmas themed decorations,such as Christmas pine bushes,pine needles wreaths,flower arrangements,handmade crafts,gift wrapping.Great for decorating Christmas trees,xmas wreaths and vases,winter wedding,festival parties,outdoor parties,helping to create more Christmas atmosphere.
